rent.source: nomads.com Da Lat cost of living Jan 2026
rent.note: furnished 1BR in Da Lat; avg $290/mo; cooler climate = less A/C cost

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Da Lat's cool climate (15-25C) cuts A/C bills

groceries.note: local Cho Da Lat market; vegetables/produce especially cheap as agricultural hub

diningOut.note: small-town prices; cafe culture strong; hot drinks popular in cool weather

transit.note: motorbike rental + Grab; Da Lat hilly but manageable

coworking.note: café coworking free with purchase; One More Cafe coworking above; limited formal spaces

simData.note: Viettel unlimited data ~200,000 VND/mo; 50+ Mbps average

misc.note: outdoor activities, entertainment, personal care, weekend trips; smaller city fewer options

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.quote: Monthly rent costs approximately $290 per month in Da Lat (as of January 2026)

evidence.claim: Da Lat single person total monthly costs ~$679-1,083; 40% cheaper than HCMC
evidence.quote: A single person's total monthly cost is around $679, while a single traveler costs approximately $1,083 per month. Da Lat's cost of living is 40% lower than Ho Chi Minh City

evidence.claim: Da Lat cafe coworking free with purchase; One More Cafe has dedicated coworking above
evidence.quote: Da Lat's most established coworking space is located above One More Cafe and is free to use with a food or drink purchase

evidence.claim: Da Lat year-round 15-25C climate; 50+ Mbps internet; 87% cheaper than NYC
evidence.quote: Da Lat is 87% cheaper than New York City. year-round temperatures between 15-25°C and stable internet speeds averaging 50+ Mbps
